answers: Blender is a free, open-source 3D creation software. It supports modeling, sculpting, animation, rendering, compositing, motion tracking, and even video editing — all in one package.

Blender is 100% free and rivals paid software like Maya and 3ds Max. Start with Blender Guru's donut tutorial on YouTube — it's the classic beginner project. Learn the interface, modeling, then materials.
Blender can do 3D modeling, character animation, architectural visualization, product design, VFX, and even 2D animation with Grease Pencil. Its Cycles renderer produces photorealistic results.
